mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, metric_type, metric_value, unit, record_date, measured_at, created_at, updated_at FROM body_metric_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND metric_type = #{metricType} ORDER BY measured_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.metric_type, r.metric_value, r.unit, r.record_date, r.measured_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM body_metric_record r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.record_date = #{date} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM body_metric_record newer WHERE newer.user_id = r.user_id AND newer.metric_type = r.metric_type AND newer.record_date = r.record_date AND ( newer.measured_at > r.measured_at OR (newer.measured_at = r.measured_at AND newer.id > r.id) ) ) ORDER BY r.metric_type ASC, r.measured_at DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.metric_type, r.metric_value, r.unit, r.record_date, r.measured_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM body_metric_record r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.metric_type = #{metricType} AND r.record_date >= #{startDate} AND r.record_date <= #{endDate} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM body_metric_record newer WHERE newer.user_id = r.user_id AND newer.metric_type = r.metric_type AND newer.record_date = r.record_date AND ( newer.measured_at > r.measured_at OR (newer.measured_at = r.measured_at AND newer.id > r.id) ) ) ORDER BY r.record_date ASC, r.measured_at ASC, r.id ASC
SELECT id, user_id, metric_type, metric_value, unit, record_date, measured_at, created_at, updated_at FROM body_metric_record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO body_metric_record (user_id, metric_type, metric_value, unit, record_date, measured_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.metricType}, #{item.metricValue}, #{item.unit}, #{item.recordDate}, #{item.measuredAt}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, metric_type, metric_value, unit, record_date, measured_at, created_at, updated_at FROM body_metric_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND metric_type = #{metricType} AND measured_at IN
#{measuredAt}
